SCNR: Subtractive Chromatic Noise Reduction — remove a color cast (usually green).
CurvesTransformation: Per-channel curve adjustment for tone and color.
HistogramTransformation: Linear histogram stretch / clipping (the nonlinear stretch workhorse).
BackgroundNeutralization: Neutralize the background color cast using a reference region.
ColorCalibration: White-balance the image from background + reference samples.
AutomaticBackgroundExtractor: Model and subtract background gradients automatically.
DynamicBackgroundExtraction: Sample-based background gradient modeling and subtraction.
MultiscaleMedianTransform: Median multiscale transform for structure-preserving denoise.
RangeSelection: Build a mask from a pixel value range.
Crop: Crop the image to a geometry.
Rotation: Rotate the image by an arbitrary angle.
ChannelCombination: Combine separate channel images into one.
RGBWorkingSpace: Set the RGB working space parameters.
Rescale: Rescale pixel values to the full dynamic range.
